reviews.review_description: Hello I am Justin and I just purchased stranger things on VR I love the content I love the gameplay however I wish it could be more like the series where we can explore Hawkins or we can go against vecna all the things just like the show I wish the creators when update the game or recreated and then add the game back to the people who have purchased it but made it a bit more in terms just like the show with more locations to explore more battles to fight more characters to play as that kind of stuff that is my wish so if you could tell me make his wish come true for all players of stranger things VR that would be the greatest thing in the world thank you so much

This is genuinely the worst game I’ve ever bought, and for 23£? You play as Vecna; for 2 / 3 chapters then it skips you onto playing cutscenes and just more utter cutscenes, chapter 7 is literally just a cutscene. The gameplay is basically; play, get stuck. Skip to the next chapter; it’s boring so you skip until you finish the NINE CHAPTERS only and realise it’s a horrible game.

reviews.review_title: Hear me out Multiplayer and sandbox
reviews.review_description: I like the game but if u had more than just bots it would be more fun and I think sandbox where you can pick ur characters and powers would be really cool and I hardly get to play eleven it’s mostly just vecna anyway’s cool game byeee

I hate this game I was hype when I get it but you barely do anything there literally cut scene half of the game and in chapter 3 you are just billy doing radio stuff even when the chapter ends it doesn’t even automatically switch chapter you have to do it your self so whoever made do better.

I have 3 suggestions to make the game even better than it is right now!

1. Add a sandbox and make it to where we can play as eleven and open gates and go to the upside down and back to the right side up.

2. Add an actual story mode with now saying every episode but like every thing important bc what we have right now is wayyy to short and also in that new story mode add the new season five stuff.

But i LOVEEE this game and hope to see more in the future.
It’s way too short and the graphics could use some work. Don’t get me wrong the story is good and it actually gives lore but it’s way too short and they should add season 5 to it.

Hello, I was wondering if you could add a story mode or sandbox mode. It would be really nice if you could add both, but pls read this and make it come true, I’m pretty sure other stranger things fans would love you to add it. Thank you very much for reading this.

I don't know why everyone is saying it's bad personally I think it's really good since I've watched stranger things but overall I don't know how to defeat the Demogorgons or demidogs there hard but I'll give it a 4 . Nice game 👏
Make a free play version as vecna so we can destroy Hawkins and something

There's a new season of  stranger thing so we need more chapters and maybe put free play and let us travel through the upside-down world right side up and I know this is a lot but allow us to be these following characters

:demogogan

I know this is a lot and you won't make 99.9% of it, but if you did do this. you won't only have the #1 show in the world, but the #1 game in the world and I know i'm not the only one that wants this!!!!!!!

It was super funny n but it was just to short I think if they had multiple story’s like example to play the story as a different character would have been cool but this game was to much money for this experience.

in my opinion i don't like this game because of lack of updates and how short the game play was i beat the game in 1 day which i got the game on christmas and i beat it the first day i got it and i played this game on my friends vr like a year ago and i got it on christmas then i had no idea that they hadn't updated it yet so when i beat it in 1 day and i've seen that they haven't updated it since i played on my friends vr it made me mad and this game has been out for a while so i'm hinted that they'll never update it  again if they would have updated it it would have been a while ago.

reviews.review_title: GREAT GAME!!! but some few ideas
reviews.review_description: So we have the portal mechanism already in the mixed reality, so we could have a sandbox mode and we could fast travel to places open portals and being able to go through them. And being able to chose your character, so like, Vecna, eleven, Henry, will. This probably won’t be seen but I wanted to say somthing
If there was like a sandbox mode where you could kinda do your own thing that would be awesome for my son and I. A lot of people are asking for it too. Please make it happen please 🙏.
The game is really cool but it would be nice add a few more chapters to the game to represent chapter 5 into the game

I just Got the game Yesterday. Finished the entitet stort mode and Already in my top 3 favorite games. I love how the characters and everything is animated but i would like a free-roam mode! There is also a ton of other players who want it too. I was thinking free-roam in the Way where you could teleport or use a portal from Vecna’s upside Down area to the overworld or What you Call it. Where yourself as Vecna goes around in hawkins making vines and possesing the children. It could also be cool if you could switch to the other main characters such as: Eleven, Mike, Dustin, Will, Lucas and Max and Way more. That was just my idea with a free-roam honestly it would make the game 100x better since that it only takes around 5-6 hours to beat the entire game. But this is not a critisicm it’s just an idea and i hope you guys Will see this. Everyone Reading this have a good day and i hope you guys Will support my idea by liking.

Sincerly Elliot the Evil

PLEASE SEE THIS IT’S AN AMAZING IDEA IN MY OPINION!!! 5 stars❤️❤️❤️🔥🔥🔥

reviews.review_title: Amazing Game I’ve played in a long time
reviews.review_description: When I started this game I was so amazed with the detail of the characters and the story line was fantastic. I have been a stranger things fan for a long time and I was thinking it would be good if the creators made an update for season 5 of stranger things. It would make me very happy for  and the other people who would like to play this game.
this game lwk sucks so much i have more fun watching coco mellon fix your game bro

I paid 25$ for this game, and while it was fun, it was super short. "9" chapters that are short and confusing, and definitely needs an update. Im not saying it was terrible, just has a lot of room for improvements. And season 5 Chapters to the game i hope are coming soon.

Great game. My only complaint is how once you finish the main story, there isn’t much to do. No sandbox or anything. If you can eventually add a sandbox to your game I will make this review a 5 star. Visuals are insane and graphics are amazing! Love the ability to actually be Vecna/Henry in VR.

This game is really fun and the powers feel awesome in VR. Playing as Vecna is cool and the story is great, but I think it would be amazing if you could also play as other characters from Stranger Things.

It would be really cool if you could choose characters like Eleven or Will. Each character could have their own powers, like Eleven using telekinesis or Will having abilities connected to the Upside Down. A character select mode with different powers would make the game even more fun and give players more ways to play.

I love the game and I hope something like this could be added in a future update!
This game is actually really good and fun to play but they should make an update and add season five chapters to actually end the story.

reviews.review_title: The game is almost perfect, hear me out.
reviews.review_description:
Firstly i love the game, the animations and eveything is perfect this is for sure my dream game (i’m a a fan of stranger things) but in the game there is a reason on why i rated the game four stars out of five. it’s because i got 3 reasons on why it’s not a 5 star game (hint: if u add those updates it will for sure be a 5 star game in my opinion) So first things first (1. The game lacks updates, they almost never update the game.)
(2. The game is very very very good BUT the game costs like 30 dollars for only a 2 hour gameplay…)
(3. THIS IS IMPORTANT) PLEASE ADD A SANDBOX  MODE CAUSE I’M SURE YOUR GAME WILL GET ALOT MORE PLAYERS AND IT WILL MAKE THE GAME BETTER OVERALL IN MY OPINION :)
So, what do yall think?

This was an amazing game. Its just too short we need more on the story maybe like a chapter 5 story or free play. We also need a dimension x too.  if you guys added this it would be the best game ever.
Pls add multiplayer my lil brother wants to play whith me but theres is no multiplayer pls add multiplayer
